mapper.select: select policy_id, policy_name, version, phase, status, del_deadline, del_deadline_unit, archive_flag, arc_del_deadline, arc_del_deadline_unit, related_law, comments, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy a where 1=1 and version in (select max(to_number(version)) from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy where policy_id = a.policy_id) order by policy_id desc

select policy_id, policy_name, version, phase, status, del_deadline, del_deadline_unit, archive_flag, arc_del_deadline, arc_del_deadline_unit, related_law, comments, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy a where 1=1 and upper(policy_id) = upper(#{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) order by to_number(version) desc
select max(to_number(version)) from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy a where upper(policy_id) = upper(#{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_piipolicy (policy_id, policy_name, version, phase, status, del_deadline, del_deadline_unit, archive_flag, arc_del_deadline, arc_del_deadline_unit, related_law, comments, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{policy_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{del_deadline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{del_deadline_unit, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{archive_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{arc_del_deadline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{arc_del_deadline_unit, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{related_law, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{comments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_date(#{regdate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd'), to_date(#{upddate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd'), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into COTDL.tbl_piipolicy (policy_id, policy_name, version, phase, status, del_deadline, del_deadline_unit, archive_flag, arc_del_deadline, arc_del_deadline_unit, related_law, comments, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{policy_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{del_deadline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{del_deadline_unit, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{archive_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{arc_del_deadline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{arc_del_deadline_unit, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{related_law, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{comments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_date(#{regdate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd'), to_date(#{upddate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd'), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select policy_id, policy_name, version, phase, status, del_deadline, del_deadline_unit, archive_flag, arc_del_deadline, arc_del_deadline_unit, related_law, comments, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy a where upper(policy_id) = upper(#{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and phase= 'CHECKIN' and status= 'ACTIVE' and version in (select max(to_number(version)) from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy where policy_id = a.policy_id and phase= 'CHECKIN' and status= 'ACTIVE')
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy where upper(policy_id) = upper(#{search1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piipolicy set policy_name= #{policy_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phase= #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, del_deadline= #{del_deadline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, del_deadline_unit= #{del_deadline_unit, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, archive_flag= #{archive_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, arc_del_deadline= #{arc_del_deadline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, arc_del_deadline_unit= #{arc_del_deadline_unit, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, related_law= #{related_law, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, comments= #{comments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upddate= SYSDATE, upduserid= #{upduserid} where upper(policy_id) = upper(#{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy a where 1=1 and version in (select max(to_number(version)) from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy where policy_id = a.policy_id)
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piipolicy select policy_id, policy_name, TO_NUMBER(version)+1, 'CHECKOUT', status, del_deadline, del_deadline_unit, archive_flag, arc_del_deadline, arc_del_deadline_unit, related_law, comments, regdate, SYSDATE as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy where upper(policy_id) = upper(#{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piipolicy set phase= 'APPROVING', upddate= SYSDATE where upper(policy_id) = upper(#{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update cotdl.tbl_piipolicy set phase= 'CHECKOUT', upddate= SYSDATE where policy_id= #{id} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update cotdl.tbl_piipolicy set phase= 'CHECKIN', upddate= SYSDATE where policy_id= #{id} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update cotdl.tbl_piipolicy set status= 'OLD', phase= 'CHECKIN', upddate= SYSDATE where policy_id= #{id} and version != #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
